## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Pax AI and GrowthX to discuss potential SEO partnership and services.](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pax AI is a Y Combinator startup offering AI-driven duty drawback services for importers/exporters](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [GrowthX provides AI-powered SEO and content strategy services, specializing in B2B SaaS companies](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves an initial 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing execution ($12K+/month)](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Pax AI is looking to improve their SEO and online presence, with speed and results in 2-3 months being priorities](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

## Topics

### Pax AI Overview

  - [1-year-old YC startup using AI to help importers/exporters get tariff refunds via duty drawback program](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [60% of customers come from internet inbound, 20-30% from partnerships, 10% from outbound/conferences](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Competing with traditional manual services (6-12 month processing) and 2 other AI startups (BeautyWise, Caspian)](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Looking to improve SEO, educate market on drawback eligibility, and differentiate from traditional providers](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

### GrowthX Services and Approach

  - [AI-driven workflows power research and content generation, overseen by expert human team](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Process: Deep persona research → content strategy → editorial roadmap → daily publishing (5+ pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Team includes former TechCrunch editor-in-chief, 20+ year SEO veterans, and ex-SEMrush lead editor](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Uses Notion for docs, Slack for communication, Airtable for content tracking](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
  - [Focuses on both conventional SEO and AI search (GEO) optimization](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=2630.0)
  - [Does not directly handle paid search management](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=2704.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Structure

  - [6-8 week initial strategy sprint ($20K) to develop growth playbook, personas, writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Ongoing execution phase starting at $12K/month for daily content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Current 6-week wait time for new client kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=2860.0)
  - [Dedicated team assigned, with weekly meetings and async Slack communication](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)

### Pax AI's Needs and Expectations

  - [Looking for results within 2-3 months, focusing on keyword rankings and quantifiable improvements](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Open to long-term partnership but want to see initial progress](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Willing to be heavily involved in process to ensure speed and quality](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Interested in both SEO strategy and potential guidance on paid search keywords](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=2662.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share case studies and additional information](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=2829.0)
  - [GrowthX to create Slack channel for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)
  - [Pax AI to consider budget and timeline, potentially schedule follow-up discussion](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)
  - [If moving forward, Pax AI to get in queue for August strategy sprint kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/dd_HGM1NLd16MNhyfykpqooZCLEd6oGW?tab=summary&timestamp=2860.0)
